sentences.target: Heute laufe ich eine lange Strecke.

translations.de: Heute laufe ich eine lange Strecke.
translations.en: Today I’m running a long route.
translations.es: Hoy voy a correr una distancia larga.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je vais courir une longue distance.
translations.it: Oggi vado a correre una lunga distanza.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我要跑一段很长的距离。
translations.yue: 今日我要跑一段好長嘅距離。
translations.pt: Hoje vou correr uma distância longa.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi sẽ chạy một quãng đường dài.
translations.nl: Vandaag ga ik een lange afstand hardlopen.
translations.hi: आज मैं लंबी दूरी दौड़ने जा रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag skal jeg løpe en lang distanse.
translations.id: Hari ini saya akan berlari jarak jauh.
translations.sv: I dag ska jag springa en lång sträcka.
translations.ro: Astăzi voi alerga o distanță lungă.
translations.da: I dag skal jeg løbe en lang tur.
translations.ja: 今日は長い距離を走ります。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb setting the time frame; placed sentence-initially in a V2 clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; occupies the V2 position.
Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative singular feminine; determiner of 'Strecke'.
Attributive adjective with mixed inflection (-e), accusative singular feminine, modifying 'Strecke'.
Common noun, accusative singular feminine; measure/object complement expressing distance with 'laufen'.

sentences.target: Die Strecke ist wegen Bauarbeiten gesperrt.

translations.de: Die Strecke ist wegen Bauarbeiten gesperrt.
translations.en: The route is closed because of construction.
translations.es: La ruta está cerrada por obras.
translations.fr: La ligne est fermée pour travaux.
translations.it: Il percorso è chiuso per lavori.
translations.zh-Hans: 因为施工，这段路封闭了。
translations.yue: 條路因為施工而封閉咗。
translations.pt: A via está interditada por obras.
translations.vi: Tuyến đường bị đóng do thi công.
translations.nl: De route is afgesloten wegens werkzaamheden.
translations.hu: Az útvonal építkezés miatt le van zárva.
translations.hi: निर्माण कार्य के कारण मार्ग बंद है.
translations.pl: Trasa jest zamknięta z powodu prac budowlanych.
translations.el: Η διαδρομή είναι κλειστή λόγω έργων.
translations.nb: Strekningen er stengt på grunn av byggearbeid.
translations.sv: Sträckan är avstängd på grund av byggarbete.
translations.ro: Traseul este închis din cauza lucrărilor.
translations.cs: Trasa je uzavřena kvůli stavebním pracím.
translations.da: Strækningen er lukket på grund af vejarbejde.
translations.ja: 工事のため、この区間は通行止めです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of the subject 'Strecke'.
Common noun, nominative singular feminine; subject of the copular clause.
Finite copula, 3rd person singular present; links subject to the predicative 'gesperrt'.
Preposition meaning 'because of', governing the genitive; introduces a causal PP.
Common noun, plural (pluralia tantum) in genitive after 'wegen'; head of the causal PP (articleless).
Past participle used adjectivally as a predicative complement; denotes resultant state.

sentences.target: Auf der Strecke gab es Stau.

translations.de: Auf der Strecke gab es Stau.
translations.en: There was a traffic jam on the route.
translations.fr: Il y avait un embouteillage sur la route.
translations.vi: Trên tuyến đường có kẹt xe.
translations.ar: كان هناك ازدحام مروري على الطريق.
translations.nl: Er stond file op de route.
translations.ja: その区間は渋滞していました。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative in a static/local reading; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; determiner of 'Strecke' after 'auf'.
Common noun, dative singular feminine; object of the preposition 'auf' (locative modifier).
Finite verb, 3rd person singular preterite; used existentially in the construction 'es gab'.
Expletive/dummy pronoun in the existential construction 'es gab'.
Common noun, accusative singular masculine; object of 'geben' in the existential clause.

sentences.target: Ich fahre jeden Tag dieselbe Strecke.

translations.de: Ich fahre jeden Tag dieselbe Strecke.
translations.en: I take the same route every day.
translations.es: Hago el mismo recorrido todos los días.
translations.fr: Je prends le même trajet chaque jour.
translations.it: Faccio lo stesso percorso ogni giorno.
translations.ru: Я каждый день езжу по одному и тому же маршруту.
translations.pt: Eu faço o mesmo trajeto todos os dias.
translations.he: אני עושה את אותו מסלול כל יום.
translations.vi: Ngày nào tôi cũng đi cùng một tuyến đường.
translations.nl: Ik neem elke dag dezelfde route.
translations.uk: Щодня я їжджу одним і тим самим маршрутом.
translations.hu: Minden nap ugyanazon az útvonalon megyek.
translations.hi: मैं हर दिन उसी रास्ते से जाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Każdego dnia jadę tą samą trasą.
translations.el: Κάθε μέρα ακολουθώ την ίδια διαδρομή.
translations.nb: Jeg tar den samme ruten hver dag.
translations.id: Setiap hari saya lewat rute yang sama.
translations.sv: Jag tar samma väg varje dag.
translations.ro: Merg pe același traseu în fiecare zi.
translations.da: Jeg tager den samme rute hver dag.
translations.ja: 毎日同じ道を通ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular, 1st person; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; V2 position.
Determiner, accusative singular masculine, modifying 'Tag'; forms a temporal accusative ('every day').
Common noun, accusative singular masculine; head of the temporal NP 'jeden Tag'.
Determiner meaning 'the same', accusative singular feminine; agrees with 'Strecke'.
Common noun, accusative singular feminine; direct object of 'fahre'.

Die Strecke ist wegen Bauarbeiten gesperrt.
Auf der Strecke gab es Stau.
Ich fahre jeden Tag dieselbe Strecke.

Die Strecke ist wegen Bauarbeiten gesperrt.
Auf der Strecke gab es Stau.
Ich fahre jeden Tag dieselbe Strecke.
en: Today I’m running a long route.
The route is closed because of construction.
There was a traffic jam on the route.
I take the same route every day.
